content.en:
Wanyuan Mountain.

One of Ye Tian's replica bodies came here, and the cultivation environment here is very good, so one of his bodies can practice here for a long time, and the other body is naturally the source sea that has been sitting in the void area and will not leave.

Moreover, there are many treasures in Wanyuan Mountain, so he naturally wants to practice retreat here.

At this time, his eternal will was raised to the mid-ninth order realm, and when his will was raised, his strength naturally increased.

However, he had only recently broken through to the realm of the Eternal Master, so it was time to increase his control.

Increasing the power of control can also improve the strength.

Therefore, he was ready to go into a long retreat to improve his control.

Originally, he was in retreat earlier, but the Ten Elements Ancestor gave him a great opportunity, and he naturally wanted to go to the Xuanlei Black Valley.

Now, when he came back from the Xuanlei Black Valley, he naturally wanted to retreat and practice.

Wanyuan Mountain.

Ye Tian practiced in retreat here, and the long years passed.

Gradually, the control power on Ye Tian's body became stronger and stronger, and his strength was also improving little by little.

10,000 Realms of River Years!

100,000 Realms of River Years!

Unconsciously, Ye Tian had practiced for 300,000 years in Wanyuan Mountain.

At this time, his control has improved a lot, and his strength has naturally increased a lot.

"My current strength should not be far from the eight-domain level master, and I can be regarded as the top seven-domain level master. "

Ye Tian muttered.

The increase in strength brought by the increase in the power of control is not too large, and if you want to have a large strength, you have to improve the body of control.

And it is very difficult to improve the body of control.

"It's time to find a second special life and practice the Soul Devouring Technique!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

The Life Devouring Technique he created could devour three special lifeforms, and he had already devoured the Black Silent Sea, gaining huge benefits, and his life level had increased too much, otherwise it would not have been possible to reach the Seven Domains level combat power so quickly.

And the second special life must be chosen well, at least not lower than the Black Silent Sea.

Of course, he won't devour the Black Silent Sea again, so it doesn't make much sense, it must be another special life in order to get more benefits.

So, he began to search for various classics in Wanyuan Mountain, looking for information on various lives.

Wanyuanshan Library.

Ye Tian searched for it, and suddenly found a kind of information that introduced various special beings comparable to those of the Eternal Master.

And there is the Silent Sea above.

"The Black Silent Sea is only ranked sixth in this data!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

In fifth place is a special life called the Dark Domain Snake, but it is very rare, the key is that the wisdom is still very high, unlike the Black Silent Sea, which is very slow, and has no wisdom, and follows instinct.

Therefore, each Dark Domain Snake was extremely terrifying, and it was even possible that it had even reached the strength of a realm-level master.

"The Dark Domain Snake is too powerful, even if it encounters it, I am afraid that it will not be able to defeat it, and it is not a suitable target. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Therefore, he gave up his plan to devour the Dark Domain Snake, and perhaps when he became stronger in the future, he could use the Dark Domain Snake as his third target.

In third place is a special life called the Shadowless Dragon, which is not visible at all in the realm below the Eternal Master, and there is only one Shadowless Dragon recorded so far, which has been taken by a great being as a pet.

"It seems that there is no way to devour the Shadowless Dragon, that great existence may be a powerhouse comparable to the master, I don't dare to fight its idea. "

Ye Tian also gave up the Shadowless Dragon.

And the special life that is ranked first has no name on it.

"It's a special life that can't record its name, and the paper used in this book can record all the information and secret arts, but I didn't expect that even the name of that life could not be recorded. "

Obviously, that life is terrifying.

I don't even know the name, so naturally I can't beat his idea.

"Hey, this second-ranked life, maybe there is really hope to get it. "

Ye Tian said expectantly.

The special life that ranks second is called the Devouring Mountain, and the reason why it is ranked second is that the strong people dare not hit its attention, and once it attacks it, its power will be devoured by it, helping it grow.

Even if its strength is many times stronger than it, it can't kill it, and it is very vindictive, once it is hated, it will continue to chase and kill, and swear to die.

There is a case recorded in this book that there was once a first-realm level controller who wanted to erase the weak devouring mountain, but the devouring mountain continued to devour its power, and finally consumed the first-realm level master.

However, without the supply of power, the strength of the Devouring Mountain will slowly decline, and eventually it will only rival the realm of ordinary Eternal Masters.

Otherwise, it wouldn't be second, but first.

"Wouldn't it be terrifying if I swallowed the Devouring Mountain and gained some of its powers?"

Ye Tian's heart moved.

Immediately, he began to investigate the news of the Devouring Mountain.

Wanyuan Mountain also had some disciples here, and Ye Tian also consulted them.

this day.

Ye Tian learned some information about the Devouring Mountain from a formal disciple.

This official disciple, called Yan Yuan, is a second-realm level controller, and his strength is naturally far superior to Ye Tian, but he is still very respectful to Ye Tian.

"Senior Brother Ye, Devouring Mountain, I've heard of it, it is said that the No. 7 Boundary River appeared once. The Devouring Mountain can move, and it can also travel through time and space, so it's not easy to find, and I haven't paid much attention to this matter, Senior Brother Ye can go to the Seventh Boundary River to look for it. "

Flame Source said.

"Thank you, Senior Brother Yanyuan. "

Ye Tian thanked.

"Senior brother, you're welcome, and I didn't help much. "

Yan Yuan hurriedly said.

Then, Ye Tian's replica body left Wanyuan Mountain and headed for the No. 7 Boundary River.

......

Origin imaginary circle.

Ye Tian tore through the barrier between the Thirteenth Boundary River and the Origin Void Circle, entered here, and then went to the Seventh Boundary River through the Origin Void Circle.

In the past, he still needed the help of the white-bearded old man, but now he can easily step into it.

Soon.

Ye Tian came to the place where the barrier between the Origin Void Circle and the No. 7 Boundary River was located.

Tear and pull!

The boundary river barrier was torn apart by Ye Tian, and he entered the seventh boundary river alone.

And as soon as he entered the Seventh Realm River, the will of the Eternal Controller spied on.

When they sensed the aura of the seventh-level controller on Ye Tian's body, they immediately withdrew their will one by one.

Seven Domains-level controllers, they can't afford to offend.

And Ye Tian shuttled away, officially going deep into the Seventh Realm River.
